meta.title: Daru Samaj Party | Join The Movement
meta.description: Join Daru Samaj Party, a community movement standing for the dignity and rights of responsible adult drinkers. Get your Instagram-ready membership card.
meta.ogDescription: Join Daru Samaj Party - a community movement standing for the dignity and rights of responsible adult drinkers. Get your official membership card.
meta.imageAlt: Daru Samaj Party - The Voice of Responsible Drinkers

hero.title: Daru Samaj Party (DSP)
hero.body: The voice of ACPs(Alcohol Consuming Persons), the fight for respect. No shame, no discrimination: responsible drinkers deserve rights, safety, and convenience.
hero.captionBody: Join, generate your card, and post the movement.

about.title: Responsible drinkers deserve dignity, safety, and basic social respect.
about.lead: Daru Samaj Party is a community movement built around one simple idea: adults who drink responsibly should be treated like adults.
about.whyBody: For too long, people who drink responsibly have been treated with unnecessary judgement, moral policing, and social hypocrisy. The same society that benefits from alcohol taxes, hospitality jobs, nightlife revenue, and local business activity often refuses to acknowledge the people who contribute to that ecosystem.
about.standsBody: We do not promote irresponsible drinking. We stand for responsible choice, safe behaviour, fair treatment, and practical reforms, from peaceful Friday nights and safer alternatives to drunk driving to home delivery with age verification and freedom from unnecessary harassment.
about.closingOne: DSP speaks for the common person who works hard all week, pays taxes, supports local businesses, and simply wants to enjoy personal time without shame, drama, or interrogation.
about.closingTwo: Daru Samaj Party stands for a society where responsible drinkers are not mocked, harassed, or treated as second-class citizens, but are recognised as people with rights, choices, and dignity.
about.closingStrong: DSP - The Voice of Responsible Drinkers.

manifesto.title: Dignity. Safety. Responsibility. Freedom.
manifesto.intro: A humorous movement with a serious demand: treat responsible adults fairly, regulate with evidence, and stop confusing personal choice with public disorder.

items.title: Dignity for Responsible Drinkers
items.body: Responsible adult drinkers deserve dignity, not shame. Drinking responsibly is a personal choice, not a character certificate.

items.title: Alcohol Is Not the Root of All Evil
items.body: Violence, addiction, unsafe behaviour, poverty, unemployment, and family conflict are serious issues, but blaming alcohol for everything hides the real causes.

items.title: Voice Against Unnecessary Alcohol Bans
items.body: DSP stands against sudden, impractical bans that create black markets, unsafe illegal liquor, corruption, smuggling, and harassment.

items.title: Responsible Drinking, Not Reckless Drinking
items.body: DSP does not support drunk driving, underage drinking, violence, addiction, or public nuisance. Irresponsible behaviour must be handled firmly and fairly.

items.title: Safe Home Delivery with Strict Age Verification
items.body: Regulated alcohol delivery can reduce drunk driving, crowding, harassment, and street nuisance when paired with legal-age verification and quantity limits.

items.title: No Harassment, No Moral Policing
items.body: Responsible drinkers should not be treated like criminals. Law should target actual offences, not personal choices.

items.title: Respect at Home and in Society
items.body: A person who works hard, pays taxes, supports businesses, and drinks responsibly deserves basic respect. Friday night should mean peace, not interrogation.

items.title: Employment and Local Economy
items.body: Alcohol, hospitality, retail, logistics, food, and nightlife support lakhs of jobs and local businesses. Policy must recognise this economic reality.

items.title: Use Alcohol Taxes Transparently
items.body: A fair share of alcohol revenue should support healthcare, de-addiction, road safety, public transport, mental health, and awareness programs.

items.title: Support for People Struggling with Addiction
items.body: Addiction should be treated as a health and social issue. People need counselling, treatment access, family support, and rehabilitation, not public shame.

items.title: Safer Public Policy, Not Hypocrisy
items.body: Regulate alcohol, educate people, prevent misuse, punish dangerous behaviour, but do not criminalise responsible adults.

manifesto.slogan: We are not slaves of alcohol. We are responsible citizens with personal choice, dignity, and rights.
manifesto.sloganStrong: Daru Samaj Party - The Voice of Responsible Drinkers.

vision.title: A society where responsible adults are treated with dignity.
vision.body: To build a society where responsible adult drinkers are treated with dignity, fairness, and respect - without unnecessary shame, harassment, or moral policing.

mission.title: The voice of responsible drinkers.
mission.body: Daru Samaj Party works to become the voice of responsible drinkers by demanding practical alcohol policies, safer choices like home delivery, protection from unnecessary harassment, and social acceptance for adults who drink responsibly.

footer.body: Responsible drinking, dignity, and practical public policy.

terms.metaDescription: Terms and conditions for using the Daru Samaj Party website and membership experience.
terms.title: Website Terms
terms.intro: These terms explain how visitors may use the Daru Samaj Party website, membership form, downloadable membership card, and related public pages.

sections.title: Use of the Website
sections.body: You may use this website for lawful, personal, and non-commercial purposes. Do not misuse the site, interfere with its operation, attempt unauthorized access, submit false or harmful data, or use the site in a way that violates applicable law.

sections.title: Membership Submissions
sections.body: If you submit details through the membership form, you are responsible for the accuracy of the information and for ensuring you have permission to upload any photo or content you provide. We may reject, remove, or moderate submissions that are abusive, illegal, misleading, or otherwise unsuitable.

sections.title: Responsible Conduct
sections.body: Daru Samaj Party supports responsible adult choice and does not encourage underage drinking, drunk driving, unsafe behavior, harassment, violence, addiction, or public nuisance. Visitors must follow all local alcohol, safety, and public-order laws.

sections.title: Intellectual Property
sections.body: Site text, branding, images, generated membership-card layouts, and design assets are owned by or licensed to Daru Samaj Party unless otherwise stated. You may share public website pages and your own generated membership card, but you may not copy, resell, or misrepresent the site assets.

sections.title: No Alcohol Sales
sections.body: This website does not sell alcohol, process alcohol orders, provide delivery services, or verify eligibility for alcohol purchase. Any references to policy, delivery, taxation, or regulation are public discussion points only.

sections.title: Third-Party Links
sections.body: The website may link to social networks, email providers, and other third-party services. Those services are governed by their own terms and privacy policies, and we are not responsible for their content, availability, or practices.

sections.title: Changes
sections.body: We may update these terms when the website changes or when legal, operational, or policy requirements change. Continued use of the site after updates means you accept the revised terms.

sections.title: Contact
sections.body: For questions about these terms, contact darusamajparty@gmail.com.

privacy.metaDescription: Privacy policy for the Daru Samaj Party website, membership form, and membership-card experience.
privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: This policy explains what information the Daru Samaj Party website may collect and how it is used for the membership experience.

sections.title: Information We Collect
sections.body: If you use the membership form, we may collect the details you provide, such as name, social handle, city, state, and uploaded photo. We may also collect basic technical information needed to operate, secure, and improve the site.

sections.title: How We Use Information
sections.body: Submitted information is used to provide the membership experience, generate a membership card, respond to contact requests, prevent spam or abuse, and maintain site reliability.

sections.title: Sharing
sections.body: We do not sell personal information. Information may be processed by hosting, database, analytics, email, or security providers that help operate the website. We may also disclose information if required by law or to protect the site and its users.

sections.title: Your Choices
sections.body: You can choose not to submit the membership form. To request removal or correction of submitted information, contact us using the email below and include enough detail for us to identify the submission.

sections.title: Data Security
sections.body: We use reasonable operational safeguards, but no website or internet transmission can be guaranteed fully secure. Avoid submitting sensitive personal, financial, health, or identity-document information through the website.

sections.title: Contact
sections.body: For privacy questions or data requests, contact darusamajparty@gmail.com.
